subcodes.first_line: O candle of the love of God! It is dawn, and the effulgence of the Covenant hath cast its rays from the Sun of the Testament upon both East and West, illumining all the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع محبت الله صبح است و پرتو میثاق از آفتاب عهد بر شرق و غرب زده و جهانی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
